# Submodel Templates Provenance

This directory is a vendored copy of the Admin Shell / IDTA submodel template
repository.

```text
Repository: https://github.com/admin-shell-io/submodel-templates
Commit: b5fe9ae671520b87adc33c67c44ccdab4373c2b1
Storage: normal tracked files, not a Git submodule
```

The generator uses these files as stable reference inputs for template-shaped
submodel transformation and validation.
